title: Coolzon Speed Cube Set 5 Pack Magic Puzzle Cubes Pyraminx Pyramid + Megaminx + 2x2x2 + 3x3x3 + 4x4x4 Cube Toys with Carbon Fiber Sticker for Kids Adults
features: Set of 5 pack Magic Cubes and Ideal Gift – Magic puzzle cube set includes 2x2x2 cube + 3x3x3 cube + 4x4x4 cube + Pyraminx Pyramid cube anf megaminx cube, packaged in a gift box. Perfect Christmas stocking fillers for boys, girls, kids, teens, adults, etc.

Speed Cube with Fast Rotation and Adjustable Tension - Good corner cutting to facilitate faster twisting and smooth rotation. The tension of the magic cube can be adjusted to better suit individual needs. Practical and lightweight size, fits perfectly in the hands and easily transportable.
Magic cube with Carbon Fiber Sticker - No worries about stickers coming off. The new material of the speedcube provides a more comfortable hand feeling.

Educational Toy Puzzle - A very interesting cube puzzle to exercise logical thinking, brain and hand coordination; improve patience and concentration. Have so much fun spinning and solving the puzzle games.
Practical and Safe - Made of original ABS plastic material, safe for human health and built sturdy.
description: From the brand Previous page Coolzon is committed to providing the highest quality puzzle cubes for puzzle cubes enthusiasts, using high-quality materials to ensure that each puzzle cubes is sturdy, durable, smooth and fluid, just to give users the best experience. Our puzzle cubes design focuses on tactile and operational experience, making every turn easy and enjoyable. Next page
